exam_format: Computer-based (Certificate Level); Written paper (Professional and Advanced Level)
exam_price_notes: Approx. £400–£600 per sitting. Open book with pre-seen industry material released in advance.

testing_centers.notes: Certificate Level papers are computer-based, booked at Pearson VUE test centres. Professional and Advanced Level papers are written (paper-based) examinations, sat in ICAEW-approved examination centres worldwide.

id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID. ICAEW student registration number required for booking. Name must match ICAEW registration.
exam_rules: Certificate Level: computer-based, closed-book, 1.5 hours per paper. Professional Level: written, 3.5 hours, tax tables provided for BPT. Advanced Level Case Study: written, 4 hours, open book (pre-seen material permitted). No personal notes or unauthorised materials.
renewal_options: ACA qualification does not expire. ICAEW members must complete a minimum of 40 CPD hours per year to maintain membership and practising certificate. Ongoing CPD is mandatory for practising members.

prerequisites.description: All three ACA Professional Level papers (CR, BPT, SBM) must be passed before attempting the Advanced Level.

retake_policy.notes: Exams are offered in March/June/September/December windows. Students may attempt each paper multiple times; full fee required for each attempt. No maximum attempt limit, but progress reviews apply under training contract rules.

official_study_resources.title: ICAEW Learning Materials (ICAEW VITAL)
official_study_resources.notes: Official ICAEW study manuals, question banks, and mock exams available via ICAEW's online learning platform (VITAL).
